name: Fury of the Frost Giant
description: You gain resistance to cold damage. Immediately after a creature you can see within 30 feet of you hits you with an attack roll and deals damage, you can use your reaction to force a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 1d8 + proficiency bonus cold damage and its speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn. You can use this reaction a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest. You also increase your Strength, Constitution, or Wisdom score by 1.
